title: Suki Gifts Yomiko Classics Dogs Lying Boxer (Medium, Brown/ White), 3 Count (Pack of 1)
features: Suki Gifts Yomiko Classics, Dogs - medium lying Boxer
Brown,black and white soft caress plush toy with airbrushed details to the face, ears and paws
Part of the Yomiko Classics lifelike animals collections
description: Product Description Supersoft plush medium lying Boxer Dog from Suki Gifts famous Yomiko Classics Dog collection. Premium quality caress soft brown and white plush Boxer with black face, realistic features and airbrushed details to the face, ears and paws. Yomiko Classics are a world famous brand offering a broad collection of realistically styled animals, many of which are uniquely enhanced with air brushed features. Approximately 13 inches (33 cm) high. Suitable for all ages. Hand wash and air dry. Other sizes and friends also available in the Yomiko Classics range of sitting and lying Cats, Dogs and Jungle animals. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Suki Gifts are an innovative British company, providing high quality gifts and soft toys including Baby, Teddy Bears, Plush toys, Mugs, Piggy Banks and much more. Box Contains 1 x Suki Gifts Yomiko Classics medium lying Boxer Dog soft toy
